rationale: Review 1’s main placement finding is confirmed by the diff: the file under `AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean` contains only generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra convolution API, so moving it to foundational `Bialgebra`/`HopfAlgebra` files would produce a better-organized PR. Review 2 only fixes the placement of one helper lemma and would leave the main misplaced public API in the algebraic-group file.
